headline: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Hits Highs On U.S.-Iran Deal; Dell Surges On Earnings
summary: The stock market rose to fresh highs Thursday on a reported interim U.S.-Iran deal. Dell soared overnight on earnings.

headline: Portman Hospitality Fund I, LP Announces Acquisition of the Westin Peachtree Plaza
summary: ATLANTA, May 28, 2026--Portman Hospitality Fund I, LP has acquired the Westin Peachtree Plaza, a 1,073-key full-service hotel in downtown Atlanta.

headline: Airlines, hotels warn against Trump admin threat to international flights to 'sanctuary cities'
summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Trump administration is considering pulling international flight processing in "sanctuary cities."
